name: Spinner
description: Indeterminate loading spinner with size variants.

api.name: Spinner
api.description: Indeterminate loading spinner with size variants.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Spinner size — scales the SVG ring / dot / bar dimensions and their gap. Default Md.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual style: Ring (rotating arc, default), Dots (three bouncing dots), or Bars (three pulsing bars).

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Visible text shown next to the spinner. Also used as the accessible name (via AriaLabel's fallback chain) when AriaLabel isn't set.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Screen-reader name when there is no visible Label. Defaults to "Loading"; set it to a localized string (or pass aria-label directly) so the spinner announces in the app's language.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: CSS text-color class (e.g. text-primary) applied to the wrapper; the SVG/dots/bars all paint via currentColor/bg-current, so this controls the spinner's color.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the wrapper div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the wrapper div.

examples.title: With Text
examples.code:
<Flex Align="center" Gap="2">
    <Spinner Size="Lumeo.Size.Sm" />
    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Color="muted">Loading...</Lumeo.Text>
</Flex>

mdSummary:
# Spinner

Indeterminate loading spinner with size variants.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Feedback
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/spinner

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Spinner | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` | Spinner size — scales the SVG ring / dot / bar dimensions and their gap. Default Md. |
| Spinner | Variant | `SpinnerVariant` | `SpinnerVariant.Ring` | Visual style: Ring (rotating arc, default), Dots (three bouncing dots), or Bars (three pulsing bars). |
| Spinner | Label | `string?` | `` | Visible text shown next to the spinner. Also used as the accessible name (via AriaLabel's fallback chain) when AriaLabel isn't set. |
| Spinner | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` | Screen-reader name when there is no visible Label. Defaults to "Loading"; set it to a localized string (or pass aria-label directly) so the spinner announces in the app's language. |
| Spinner | Color | `string?` | `` | CSS text-color class (e.g. text-primary) applied to the wrapper; the SVG/dots/bars all paint via currentColor/bg-current, so this controls the spinner's color. |
| Spinner | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the wrapper div. |
| Spinner | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary\<string, object\>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the wrapper div. |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Example
```razor
<Spinner />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--radius`
